title: Fix Registration Flow: Details Form → Internet Identity Step

requirements.summary: Fix the multi-step registration flow so that Step 1 collects Name, Phone Number, and BGMI Player ID, then Step 2 renders the Internet Identity login/authentication button to complete registration.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 1 of registration shows Name, Phone Number, and BGMI Player ID fields
After submitting Step 1, the page transitions to Step 2 which displays the Internet Identity login button
Internet Identity button is fully visible and clickable in Step 2
After successful Internet Identity authentication, the player is registered and redirected to the player dashboard
The step indicator clearly shows progress (Step 1 → Step 2 → Success)

file_operations.description: Refactor the registration page to properly implement a two-step flow: Step 1 collects displayName, mobile, and bgmiPlayerId via a form with validation; on Step 1 submit, store the form data in component state and advance to Step 2. Step 2 renders a prominent Internet Identity login button with clear instructions. Wire the Internet Identity authentication flow (using useInternetIdentity hook) to trigger after the user clicks the button in Step 2. After successful Internet Identity authentication, call the registerPlayer backend mutation with the stored form data from Step 1, then redirect to the player dashboard. Update the step indicator UI to clearly show Step 1 → Step 2 → Success transitions. Preserve existing styling and brand theme. Ensure the Internet Identity button is fully visible and clickable in Step 2.
